title: KH Survival ModPack
description: Tired of your game lagging or crashing with heavy modpacks? This pack is built specifically for players on low-end PCs, laptops, or older devices. Got around 50 to 60 mods in it.
body:
✨ Lightweight Modpack for Low-End Devices ✨

Tired of your game lagging or crashing with heavy modpacks? This pack is built specifically for players on low-end PCs, laptops, or older devices. It keeps things smooth and stable while still adding fun enhancements to your gameplay.

✅ Optimized Performance – Carefully chosen mods that won’t overwhelm your system.
✅ Lightweight Additions – Quality-of-life tweaks, small improvements, and simple features.
✅ Low System Requirements – Runs well on machines with limited RAM, weaker CPUs, or integrated graphics.
✅ Perfect for Casual Play – Whether you’re surviving, building, or exploring, this pack ensures a smooth experience.

This is the perfect starter-friendly, low-lag modpack for players who want fun without sacrificing performance!
